"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2024.2.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\OOP_Project.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\OOP_Project.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\OOP_Project.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\OOP_Project.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o OOP_Project.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libOOP_Project.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\OOP_Project.dir\linkLibs.rsp
